nasb.text: So they put away the foreign gods from among them and served the Lord; and He could bear the misery of Israel no longer.

esv.text: So they put away the foreign gods from among them and served the Lord, and he became impatient over the misery of Israel.

cnv.text: 以色列人就從他們中間除去外族人的神，事奉耶和華；耶和華的心因以色列人所受的患難，就很著急。

ccb.text: 以色列人除掉了他们的外邦神像，转而事奉耶和华。耶和华不忍再看以色列人受苦。
